# ✨ Disclose Selectively
**📜 → ✂️(selective) → 👁️(only-this-much)**
*aletheia · zk · V38*

Selective disclosure across verification surfaces. Choose what the proof reveals; the rest stays at V25.

> Selective disclosure is geometry, not policy. The shape of what is shown is the shape of what is asked.

*Keywords:* selective-disclosure · verification · geometry · v25
